changes.before: Jaina knelt in the spill by the door, set her staff against the wall, and laid both palms against the packed-earth floor.
changes.after: Jaina knelt in the spill by the door, setting her staff against the wall before she laid both palms against the packed-earth floor.
changes.rationale: Added connective tissue at the taint-read start without changing the order of action.

changes.before: Sylvanas turned from the granary and walked back into the lane.
changes.after: Sylvanas turned from the granary, walking back into the lane.
changes.rationale: Smoothed a hard action handoff into the next investigative beat.

changes.before: Sylvanas crouched and pressed her fingertips into the nearest print.
changes.after: Sylvanas crouched, pressing her fingertips into the nearest print.
changes.rationale: Converted a blunt two-verb action into a single flowing movement.

changes.after: Sylvanas took the steps first, descending into damp dark with bow in hand and an arrow nocked.
changes.rationale: Added structural texture to the transition into the survivor reveal.

changes.before: They brought Miri into the last of the light, and Neral wrapped her in a ranger's cloak before putting a waterskin in her hands, correcting the first desperate gulp with the same firm touch she used on skittish horses.
changes.after: They brought Miri into the last of the light, Neral wrapping her in a ranger's cloak before putting a waterskin in her hands and correcting the first desperate gulp with the same firm touch she used on skittish horses.
changes.rationale: Kept the beat intact while reducing the stop-start cadence around Neral's care.

changes.before: Jaina knelt at the verge where Cyndia's first marker stood. She planted the staff in the mud, spread both hands over the road, and the crystal went dark.
changes.after: Jaina knelt at the verge where Cyndia's first marker stood, planting the staff in the mud before she spread both hands over the road. The crystal went dark, sweat breaking along her hairline in the cold.
changes.rationale: Enriched the magic-reading transition and folded two short beats into a more textured sequence.

changes.before: She kept the message short. Field dispatches were for numbers, direction, and threat. Anything else belonged to desks.
changes.after: She kept the message short, writing for numbers, direction, and threat because anything else belonged to desks.
changes.rationale: Collapsed a dry explanatory cluster into one sentence without losing Sylvanas's field logic.

changes.before: Neral strapped the tube to the saddle ring and checked the leather twice.
changes.after: Neral strapped the tube to the saddle ring, checking the leather twice.
changes.rationale: Added connective tissue in a procedural beat that had been overly clipped.

changes.before: He clicked his tongue, and the wagon creaked forward through the lane.
changes.after: He clicked his tongue, the wagon creaking forward through the lane.
changes.rationale: Smoothed the trader's exit so the road movement carries into the next paragraph.

changes.before: Jaina mounted without asking where they were going and settled the staff across her thighs, mud still drying dark on the hem of her robes and grain dust caught at one sleeve.
changes.after: Jaina mounted without asking where they were going, settling the staff across her thighs with mud still drying dark on the hem of her robes and grain dust caught at one sleeve.
changes.rationale: Added connective tissue to the departure beat while preserving the same image set.
